decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the Codex context minor GC work. Recent state: the previously failing live evals were rerun and reported green after two general fixes: reject activating `continue` when any required turn was demoted to pin-only, and stop forcing `summary-first` when raw-keep is lighter. Older resolved context can be compacted. Preserve as pins that the user asked to expand harder Chinese multi-turn topic-shift cases into fixed regression coverage and explicitly preferred non-whitelist, non-hardcoded generalization.
decision.reasoning_summary: This is the same ongoing task, so relation is continue. Keep the latest user turn implicitly plus the newest assistant result as raw active-topic evidence. The user’s durable task constraints from t3 and t5 should survive as compact pins because they still shape further work even if the older raw turns leave the prompt.
